Package org.areslib.math.kinematics

package org.areslib.math.kinematics

  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AresOdometry
    Universal Odometry class that integrates ChassisSpeeds and Gyro angles to estimate the robot's Pose2d on the field.
    ChassisSpeeds
    Represents the speed of a robot chassis.
    DifferentialDriveKinematics
    Differential Drive Kinematics solver.
    DifferentialDriveOdometry
     
    DifferentialDriveWheelPositions
    Represents the wheel positions for a differential drive drivetrain.
    DifferentialDriveWheelSpeeds
    DifferentialDriveWheelSpeeds standard implementation.
    InverseMatrixHelper
    Utility for performing standard matrix operations specifically tailored for drivetrain kinematics, like Cramer's Rule inversions.
    KinematicAiming
    Utility for "Shoot-On-The-Move" kinematic aiming.
    KinematicAiming.AimResult
    The result of a kinematic aiming calculation.
    MecanumDriveKinematics
    Mecanum Drive Kinematics solver.
    MecanumDriveOdometry
     
    MecanumDriveWheelPositions
    MecanumDriveWheelPositions standard implementation.
    MecanumDriveWheelSpeeds
    MecanumDriveWheelSpeeds standard implementation.
    SOTMSolver
    Shoot-On-The-Move (SOTM) Solver.
    SwerveDriveKinematics
    Helper class that converts a chassis velocity (dx, dy, and dtheta components) into individual module states and vice versa.
    SwerveDriveOdometry
    Class for swerve drive odometry.
    SwerveModulePosition
    Represents the state of one swerve module relating to its distance and angle.
    SwerveModuleState
    Represents the state of one swerve module.
